title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 338.310 - Violation, a misdemeanor
text:
338.310.  Violation, a misdemeanor. — Every person who violates any provision of sections 338.210 to 338.300 shall, upon conviction thereof, be adjudged guilty of a class C misdemeanor.
(L. 1951 p. 734 § 7, A.L. 1981 S.B. 16)
